symbayes 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Methods
    • Overview of the pipeline
    • DMM: Dirichlet-Multinomial Mixture
    • LDA: Latent Dirichlet Allocation
    • HDP: Hierarchical Dirichlet Process
    • Generalist plots across models
    • Case studies
    • Reanalysing a turbinaria SymPortal run

Package index

Entry points

Read a SymPortal run and prepare it for modelling. Everything flows through a single symbayes object.

import()
Import SymPortal output into a symbayes object
filter_samples()
Filter a symbayes object by prevalence and sequencing depth

Fit a model

The three mixture models. Each fits, selects (or infers) the number of groups, and writes a standardised membership object into the symbayes object.

fit_dmm()
Fit a Dirichlet-Multinomial Mixture model
fit_lda()
Fit a Latent Dirichlet Allocation topic model
fit_hdp()
Fit a Hierarchical Dirichlet Process

Generalist plots

Visualisations that apply to any fitted model via a model = c("dmm", "lda", "hdp") argument.

plot_pcoa()
PCoA ordination coloured by a fitted model's grouping (or any variable)
plot_barplot()
Stacked sequence-composition barplot faceted by a model's groups
plot_exemplars()
Exemplar composition per group (what a "pure" sample looks like)
plot_membership()
Membership heatmap (per-sample group proportions)
plot_contingency()
Contingency heatmap: a model's groups vs SymPortal profiles
plot_top_seqs()
Top characterising sequences per group

DMM: diagnostics, prediction, validation

Functions specific to the Dirichlet-Multinomial Mixture (hard assignment).

dmm_plot_selection()
Plot DMM model selection (Laplace, AIC, BIC vs K)
predict_dmm()
Predict DMM component membership for new samples
dmm_loo()
Leave-one-out cross-validation for DMM
dmm_subsample_cv()
Repeated subsampling cross-validation for DMM
dmm_simulate()
Simulate samples and test DMM assignment (blend / perturb / from_alpha)

LDA: topic diagnostics

Functions specific to Latent Dirichlet Allocation (fractional membership).

lda_plot_ksearch()
Plot the LDA K-selection search
lda_plot_similarity()
Plot the LDA topic cosine-similarity matrix
lda_topic_summary()
Text summary of LDA topics with SymPortal / host cross-reference

HDP: threshold-free diagnostics

Functions specific to the Hierarchical Dirichlet Process, including over-classification quantification.

hdp_plot_numcomp()
Plot the HDP posterior distribution of component number
hdp_vs_symportal()
Quantify SymPortal over-classification relative to HDP

Cross-model comparison

Compare group counts and within-sample mixing across models.

compare_models()
Compare group counts and selection strategy across fitted models
compare_mixing()
Compare within-sample mixing across models and SymPortal
compare_soft_hard()
Compare a soft (fractional) model against SymPortal's profiles via the fuzzy Rand index
match_profiles()
Match model topics/components to SymPortal profiles by composition
name_topics()
Name a fitted model's topics/components in SymPortal style
plot_admixtures()
Admixture plot: mixed samples, sequence mix over boxed component structure
plot_soft_hard()
Visualise soft-vs-hard co-membership agreement as heatmaps
plot_symportal_comparison()
Four-row SymPortal-vs-model comparison over all samples
set_dominance()
Relabel dominant assignment with a minimum-dominance threshold

Package

symbayes symbayes-package
symbayes: Threshold-Free, Mixture-Aware Symbiodiniaceae ITS2 Profiling
print(<symbayes>)
Print method for symbayes objects
print(<symbayes_membership>)
Print method for membership objects

On this page
